overview: Keshav Agro Foods is a modern, health-focused business website for a natural soy-based food brand. It showcases Soya Milk, Tofu, and Soya Shrikhand with a clean, premium design emphasizing plant-based nutrition, sustainability, and purity.
features: Hero section with brand tagline and dual CTAs
Product showcase with hover cards for Soya Milk, Tofu, Soya Shrikhand
About Us page with brand story, mission and vision
Health Benefits section covering protein, fitness, and lactose-free advantages
Sustainability section with eco-friendly production and ethical sourcing
Contact page with form, address, and phone details
Why Choose Us section with benefit icons
